title: Transregional trade
description: Practice your skills with a quiz on syncretism and the Silk Road!

assessment_items.question_content:
[[☃ image 1]]

**The artwork shown above was most directly a result of which of the following?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

options.alt: Buddhist statue with Greek dress, from Gandhara, second or third century CE.
options.caption: Buddhist statue with Greek dress, from Gandhara, second or third century CE. Image credit: [Wikimedia](https://cdn.kastatic.org/ka-perseus-images/c13ef558f9d1a909bc539099a40bcf5cf299175e.jpg)

choices.content: The spread of Hellenism and Buddhism due to conquest and trade, respectively
Increased trade in the types of stone used in sculpture between Greece and India in the second century CE.
The spread of Buddhism by Alexander the Great during his conquest of the Persian Empire
The spread of Buddhism during the military expansion of the Mauryan Empire under Ashoka

assessment_items.question_content:
[[☃ image 1]]

**Which of the following was a significant __cause__ of the growth of trade routes pictured in this map?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

options.alt: Map of the silk roads and spice trade routes. Overland routes in red, maritime routes in blue.
options.caption: Map of the silk roads and spice trade routes. Overland routes in red, maritime routes in blue. Image credit: [Wikimedia Commons](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/9/9e/Silk_route_copy.jpg )

choices.content: Climate changes due to the Little Ice Age made travel easier
Growth of large empires, such as the Roman and Han
Development of systems of credit in Europe

assessment_items.question_content:
[[☃ image 1]]

**Which of the following was an important development that contributed to the patterns illustrated by the map?** 

[[☃ radio 1]]

options.alt: Map of the silk roads and spice trade routes. Overland routes in red, maritime routes in blue.
options.caption: Map of the silk roads and spice trade routes. Overland routes in red, maritime routes in blue. Image credit: [Wikimedia Commons](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/9/9e/Silk_route_copy.jpg )

assessment_items.question_content:
[[☃ image 1]]

**Knowledge of the monsoon wind patterns shown in this image contributed most directly to which of the following?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

options.alt: Monsoon wind patterns affecting east Africa, India, and southeast Asia.
options.caption: Monsoon wind patterns affecting east Africa, India, and southeast Asia.

choices.content: Decrease in trade to avoid the heavy monsoon conditions
Increase in overland trade to avoid the heavy monsoon conditions
Innovations in marine technology to adapt to monsoon conditions
Innovations in migration to adapt to monsoon conditions in new places
